scripts.install:backend: cmd /c "cd backend && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements_core.txt"
scripts.install:backend:full: cmd /c "cd backend && venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements_full.txt"
scripts.dev: concurrently --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 2000 -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
